name: truthful-attribution-gate (cinatra-ai)
description: Org-standard thin caller for the truthful-attribution gate in cinatra-ai/ci, double-pinned to a tagged release SHA. Verifies commit Assisted-by attribution trailers per the ratified truthful-attribution spec. Ships in WARN mode (findings annotated, check always green); the org rollout makes 'truthful-attribution-gate / truthful-attribution-gate' a required check, so every new repo needs this workflow seeded.
